title: athyrium omeiense
intro: Athyrium omeiense, also known as the Omei fern or Chinese spleenwort, is a type of flowering plant in the Athyriaceae family. It is native to mountainous regions of China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing digestive issues. Athyrium omeiense is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
